why_bad: Public copy overpromises a campus-specific rotation when the source covers an entire SOM
example_if_known: Jackson Memorial — UM Miller SOM page covers many sites; deferred for this reason
queue_4_guardrail: Queue-4 row's notes column must flag SYSTEM_PAGE if source URL is the SOM-not-hospital page; activation requires SYSTEM_PAGE_SOURCE_NO_<SITE>_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE caveat

why_bad: Residency / fellowship / GME pages are not visiting-medical-student pages
example_if_known: HCA Aventura was Class-A in original but turned out to be GME-focused → Class-D wrong-lane
queue_4_guardrail: If source URL contains /residency or /gme without a separate /visiting-students lane mark KEEP_INTERNAL or future-lane

why_bad: SOM-affiliated rotations may only be open to that SOM's own students or named-partner students
queue_4_guardrail: Verify "visiting students from other LCME schools" or "VSLO" language explicitly

why_bad: Asserting IMG eligibility without source language
queue_4_guardrail: If source does not say "international medical graduates" or equivalent verbatim default to UNKNOWN_NOT_STATED for IMG

why_bad: Asserting J-1 / H-1B sponsorship without explicit source
queue_4_guardrail: Default to NO_J1_VERIFIED + NO_H1B_VERIFIED if source is silent

why_bad: Old Wayback snapshot may not reflect current eligibility
example_if_known: Mount Sinai Wayback was 2026-02-11 — fine but newer snapshots beat older
queue_4_guardrail: Prefer fresh-this-sprint Wayback save; allow ARCHIVE_PRIOR_VERIFIED only if HEAD-verified within 90 days

why_bad: Evidence triple is filled but the source's actual scope is unclear
example_if_known: Mayo system page (one URL for 3 Mayo sites) — quote_manifest rated PARTIAL
queue_4_guardrail: If quote_manifest would rate PARTIAL stop and mark NEEDS_EVIDENCE_HARDENING

why_bad: Updating a validator to accept lower bar instead of fixing data
queue_4_guardrail: Validators may be EXTENDED but not weakened; original invariants must remain

why_bad: Continuing infrastructure work past the point where new product is the bottleneck
queue_4_guardrail: If 3 consecutive sprints don't grow active runtime trigger a strategic checkpoint

why_bad: Forcing deferred rows active to grow the count
example_if_known: Slice-3 candidate set (Jackson / Methodist San Antonio) — DO NOT activate without per-site source landed

why_bad: Violates the project's standing data-collection rules
queue_4_guardrail: Official / public sources only; no API scraping; no login bypass
T7 is read-only canonical; Mac-local clean branch is the only mutating lane

why_bad: Production must remain at 0 USCE cards until USCE is excellent
queue_4_guardrail: validate-micro-pilot-runtime ensures noindex+nofollow; no merge to main

why_bad: Sprint-scope discipline; commits must be reviewable
notes: Stage by named path only; no broad git add .

example_if_known: gh auth status -t accidentally exposed a gho_ token in an earlier sprint
queue_4_guardrail: Never use -t with gh auth status; redact AIza/AKIA/ghp_/etc patterns; validate-no-secrets must PASS before commit
